name: Tiger 18R BSW 380W

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C42F556E-1C5D-49B5-A83D-0299FAAC4F78

comment: Tiger 18R BSW 380W CMY Moving Head 2pcs in Flightcase: The Tiger E 7R moving head MKIII has a very bright output due to the use of the 7R 230W high intensity discharge bulb. The moving head is equipped with a colour, frost, gobo and prism effect wheel for ultimate control; the gobo wheel is provided with 17 different gobos + open and the colour wheel with 14 colours + open. Together with the motorized 16-facet rotating prism it can create a wide range of spectacular light effects. The Tiger E 7R moving head MKIII works both in DMX or stand-alone mode. When operating in DMX mode you have complete control with 15 or 19 DMX channels. Among its features are a mechanical shutter and adjustable speed strobe, frost lens, rotation prism, motorized focus and mechanical dimmer. Simple operation and easy to adjust.

slots.name: Counter clockwise rotation from fast to slow
Clockwise rotation from slow to fast

capabilities.comment: Zoom from max to min beam angle
Reset pan and tilt after 3 seconds
